body:
G2: FAIL — MUS-1652 is non-verifiable because dependency gates are unmet and no FE evidence bundle exists.

Deterministic gate replay (2026-04-13 KST):
1) `GET /api/issues/b96b7dbd-1dfd-49ec-93e5-c7529589d215`
- Result: `status=blocked`.

2) `GET /api/issues/b96b7dbd-1dfd-49ec-93e5-c7529589d215/comments`
- Latest CTO note (`091142b5-566c-479f-865e-87df260b6282`) explicitly says: keep blocked until
  - FE posts complete MUS-1651 artifact bundle, and
  - CTO issues explicit `G1: PASS` on MUS-1651.

3) `GET /api/issues/dabb8168-d9d0-4b9f-a3e2-e6f719494315` (MUS-1651)
- Result: `status=todo`.

4) `GET /api/issues/dabb8168-d9d0-4b9f-a3e2-e6f719494315/comments`
- Contains directives only; no posted artifact/screenshot bundle and no strict `G1: PASS` token.

Regression/authenticity check:
- No admissible before/after visual evidence set exists yet, so variant parity/contrast/responsive acceptance cannot be reproduced.

Artifact:
- `/home/hugh51/musu-functions/.qa-artifacts/g2-mus1652-20260413T015309+0900.log`

[TBD: awaiting real data] provider=MUS-1651_EVIDENCE owner=Founding Engineer eta=[TBD]
[TBD: awaiting real data] provider=CTO_G1_PASS owner=CTO eta=[TBD]

Blocker fix criteria:
1) FE posts required Packet A evidence bundle on MUS-1651 (artifact path/id, desktop+mobile screenshots, inventory, handoff spec, motion/accessibility/state matrices).
2) CTO posts explicit `G1: PASS` comment on MUS-1651 citing that bundle.
3) Re-queue MUS-1652 for fresh G2 visual audit replay.
